EmailTemplate.name: Presales New Lead Created
EmailTemplate.subject: Welcome to Runwal
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear Sir/Madam,
Thank you for showing interest in our project {!Lead.Project_Name__c}. Please visit www.runwalgroup.in to know more. You may call on 02248807012 for any assistance.
With Warm Regards, Team Presales, Runwal Group.
